creator: stadtkind2@gmx.de
text:
Being a big fan of OpenGrok ( http://hub.opensolaris.org/bin/view/Project+opengrok/ ) and using it quite often to search various source codes, i.e.

OpenSolaris http://src.opensolaris.org/source/

and even NetBSD http://opengrok.netbsd.org/

I know there *was* a 3rd party OpenGrok Server (see http://moduli.net/2006/12/freebsd-opengrok.html ), but sadly it's down now and I have no idea if it will ever return.

So I'd love to see an *official* OpenGrok server for FreeBSD.

I also know there are things like cvsweb/svn and http://fxr.watson.org/ , but the first can't be searched at all and fxr is for kernel source(s) only.
